home.title: Heavyweight Quality, Guaranteed Strength.
home.subtitle: With years of experience, we specialize in providing robust high-pressure hoses, ideal for heavy industry applications. Our products guarantee safety and efficiency across various sectors, such as naval and steel industries.
home.titleMapa: With a presence throughout Latin America, Mamuth combines experience, excellence, and technical expertise to deliver robust, safe, and high-performance solutions for highly complex industrial operations.
home.descriptionMapa: We operate across various industrial segments, offering high and ultra-high pressure water jetting solutions for applications that demand efficiency, safety, and high operational performance.
home.textoSucro: with applications in the cleaning of evaporators, boilers, heaters, syrup lines, and piping in general.
home.offshore: Oil & Gas sector, offshore and onshore
home.textoOffshore: with solutions for industrial maintenance, technical cleaning, and surface preparation in high-demand environments.
home.textoNaval: with applications in hull cleaning, fouling removal, structural maintenance, and surface preparation.
home.textoConstrucao: utilizing water jetting for concrete cleaning, surface preparation, scabbling, and hydrodemolition.
home.textoPetroquimica: with applications in heat exchangers, tanks, piping, vessels, and boilers.
home.textoPapel: with solutions for the technical cleaning of equipment, ducts, piping, and critical industrial structures.
home.textoMineracao: with applications in heavy-duty cleaning, material cutting, and maintenance of high-demand operational areas.
home.textoEnergia: operating in ducts, cyclone towers, refractories, furnaces, and other complex industrial systems.
home.subtitleProdutos: High-quality equipment for all your industrial needs.
home.subtitleExcelencia1: Mamuth is a national leader in high-pressure equipment and industrial cleaning solutions. With over two decades of experience, we offer products and services that combine cutting-edge technology, operational efficiency, and specialized technical support.
home.subtitleExcelencia2: Our mission is to provide complete solutions that increase productivity and reduce our clients' operational costs, always with a commitment to quality, safety, and sustainability.
home.subtitleEscolher: Technical specialization, complete SAP and UHP portfolio, and support that keeps pace with your operations.
home.subtitlePortifolio: Mamuth operates with a comprehensive portfolio of SAP (high pressure) and UHP (ultra-high pressure) solutions, serving industrial operations that demand performance, safety, and reliability.
home.texto1Portifolio: Equipment, components, and accessories for various pressure regimes.
home.texto2Portifolio: Solutions applicable to industrial, offshore, naval, and infrastructure environments.
home.texto3Portifolio: Configurations aligned with the real demand of each operation.
home.texto4Portifolio: Focus on operational efficiency and continuity.
home.subtitleConhecer: Our operations are guided by technical knowledge and a deep understanding of water jetting applications, supporting our clients in choosing the most suitable solution for every scenario.
home.texto1Conhecer: Technical support in defining pressure, flow rate, and system configuration.
home.texto2Conhecer: Analysis of the operational context and usage conditions.
home.texto3Conhecer: Technical guidance for the correct assembly of the set.
home.texto4Conhecer: Reduction of risks, operational failures, and unnecessary costs.
home.subtitleSuporte: Mamuth offers a technical support and after-sales structure focused on operational stability and safety over time, accompanying the client after the purchase.
home.texto1Suporte: Technical support for application, installation, and operation.
home.texto2Suporte: Guidance on best practices and preventive maintenance.
home.texto3Suporte: Ongoing support for adjustments, expansions, or solution upgrades.
home.subtitleParcerias: Mamuth maintains solid partnerships with world-class manufacturers, bringing to the Latin American market solutions recognized for engineering excellence, robustness, and operational reliability.
home.texto1Parcerias: Strategic partnership with Falch and Parker Polyflex, global benchmarks in water jetting and high pressure.
home.texto2Parcerias: Access to technologies developed under rigorous German engineering standards.
home.texto3Parcerias: Acting as the technical link between the manufacturer and the final customer.
home.texto4Parcerias: Technical support, application guidance, and after-sales follow-up in Latin America.

produtos.subtitleProdutos: Complete solutions in high-pressure equipment and industrial systems.
produtos.subtitleCards: High-quality equipment for all your industrial needs.
produtos.textMangueiras: Complete line of precision hydraulic equipment for diverse industrial applications.
produtos.textLavadoras: Robust equipment designed for high-demand industrial operations, featuring cutting-edge technology and maximum efficiency.
produtos.textVestimentas: High-resistance industrial protection for critical environments and high-risk sectors. Maximum safety for workers and equipment with guaranteed durability.
produtos.textRobo: In partnership with Falch, we offer ultra-high pressure robots that guarantee safety and efficiency in industrial cleaning, combining German technology and high productivity for demanding operations.
produtos.textBombas: High-performance industrial pumps, developed for demanding water jetting applications, with maximum reliability and operational efficiency.
produtos.textBicos: High-performance nozzles developed for water jetting applications, ensuring efficiency in cleaning, cutting, and residue removal at different pressure levels.
produtos.specs3Bicos: Compatibility with different pressures and applications
produtos.textAcessorioHidro: Complete line of water jetting accessories developed to ensure performance, safety, and efficiency in industrial operations.
produtos.specs3AcessoriosHidro: Tube clean and internal cleaning solutions
produtos.textAcessoriosLavadoras: Complete line of accessories for water jetting machines up to 600 bar, developed to ensure efficiency, control, and durability in industrial cleaning and maintenance operations.
produtos.textPecas: Solutions in parts and components for high and ultra-high pressure pumps, developed to ensure performance, reliability, and extended equipment service life.
produtos.desc2Lavadoras: Options with heated water up to 100 °C for heavy-duty cleaning
produtos.desc3Lavadoras: Flow rate sized according to the application
produtos.desc4Lavadoras: Robust structure for continuous industrial operation
produtos.desc1Vestimentas: Maximum Resistance: Built for harsh environments.
produtos.desc2Vestimentas: Versatile Use: Serves mining, oil, and gas industries.
produtos.desc3Vestimentas: Total Safety: Protection for personnel and machinery.
produtos.desc4Vestimentas: Complete Line: Apparel, boots, and accessories.
produtos.desc5Vestimentas: High Durability: Long service life under heavy stress.
produtos.desc1Robo: German Falch technology, a world leader in waterjetting
produtos.desc2Robo: Robotic solutions for high and ultra-high pressure operations
produtos.desc3Robo: Increased operational safety and reduced operator exposure
produtos.desc4Robo: High precision and control in applications
produtos.desc5Robo: Various models to meet diverse operational needs

cta.textCTA: Our technical team is ready to develop the perfect solution for your operation.

sobre.textSobre: Over 20 years of experience in high-pressure industrial solutions.
sobre.textMissao: To provide complete and innovative solutions in high-pressure equipment and industrial services, with exceptional quality, specialized technical support, and commitment to customer satisfaction, contributing to the increased productivity and operational efficiency of our partners.
sobre.textVisao: To be recognized as the leading high-pressure solutions company in Brazil, a benchmark in innovation, quality, and service; expanding our presence into new markets and consolidating strategic international partnerships, while always maintaining our commitment to excellence and sustainability.
sobre.textEstrutura: With over two decades of operation, Mamuth is a national benchmark in high-pressure solutions. We combine tradition and cutting-edge technology to deliver equipment that ensures maximum performance and absolute safety for your industry's most critical operations.
sobre.subtitleValores: The principles that guide our actions and decisions every day.
sobre.subtitleQualidade: Commitment to excellence in all our products and services.
sobre.subtitleInovacao: Constant search for advanced and efficient technological solutions.
sobre.subtitleConfiabilidade: A trusted partner for critical industrial operations.
sobre.subtitleSustentabilidade: Responsible practices that respect the environment.
sobre.subtitleExcelencia: Exceeding expectations in every project and service.
sobre.subtitleMarcas: We carefully select each partner to offer the best to the Brazilian market.
sobre.subtitleParker: Parker Polyflex is a global leader in motion and control technologies, providing essential components for water jetting systems, such as high-pressure hoses, fittings, and valves. Recognized for quality and reliability, the company has a strong presence in Brazil, offering safe and efficient solutions for industrial applications.
sobre.subtitleFalch: Falch is a German manufacturer specializing in water jetting equipment and high-pressure systems for industrial applications. With over 40 years of experience, it develops robust and innovative solutions recognized for efficiency, durability, and high performance in demanding operations.
sobre.subtitleTrajetoria: Decades of growth and innovation in the industrial sector.
sobre.text2003: Commencement of activities in São Paulo, focusing on providing industrial solutions for high-pressure applications.
sobre.text2008: Expansion of the product line and strengthening of Mamuth's presence in the industrial market.
sobre.text2013: Strengthening the company's presence across different industry segments, focusing on quality, technical support, and tailored solutions.
sobre.text2017: Growth of Mamuth's physical structure to support new demands, scale operations, and enhance market service efficiency.
sobre.text2019: Mamuth becomes an official Parker Polyflex distributor, expanding its portfolio with world-renowned high and ultra-high pressure solutions.
sobre.text2025: Start of the partnership with Falch, a German manufacturer and global benchmark in ultra-high pressure water jetting equipment.
sobre.text2026: Opening of the strategic unit in Macaé to primarily serve the offshore, naval, and oil & gas sectors.

footer.textFooter: Heavyweight Quality, Guaranteed Strength. Complete solutions in industrial equipment and water jetting.
footer.endereco: Street Curuçá 1149 Vila Maria - São Paulo/SP, CEP: 02120-002
footer.endereco2: Avenue Pref. Aristeu Ferreira da Silva, 321 Novo Cavaleiros - Macaé/RJ

noticias.subtitleNoticias: Stay up to date with the latest news and events from Mamuth.
noticias.subtitleCards: Follow our launches, partnerships, and updates.
noticias.titleNoticia1: 5 Years Participating in the World’s Largest Bioenergy Fair.
noticias.textoNoticia1: For over five years, Mamuth Hydro has walked side by side with the leaders of bioenergy at FENASUCRO & AGROCANA. With more than 53,000 visitors, 1,600 exhibiting brands, and a business environment that only the world's largest trade show for the bioenergy chain can offer. In 2026, we will be in Sertãozinho once again, from August 11 to 14, presenting high-performance hydraulic solutions for those driving the future of the energy matrix. Those who know us, come back. Those who are Mamuth, make their presence felt.
noticias.titleNoticia2: R$ 12 Billion in Business. And You, Where Will You Be?
noticias.textoNoticia2: As the naval and offshore industry prepares to move billions at the 20th Navalshore, Mamuth Hydro has already secured its spot. We know that an event which gathered more than 18,000 professionals and the largest shipyards and oil companies in Latin America is the right place for those seeking solutions that truly deliver.
noticias.btnNoticia2: Schedule a Meeting with Our Team

contato.subtitleContato: We are ready to meet your needs and answer your questions.

form.conheceu: How did you hear about Mamuth?

fenasucro.title: Fenasucro Fair
fenasucro.subtitle: 5 Years Participating in the World's Largest Bioenergy Fair.
fenasucro.texto1: FENASUCRO & AGROCANA is recognized as the world's largest trade fair dedicated to the bioenergy production chain, bringing together companies, specialists, and leaders from the sugar-energy sector to present innovations, technologies, and solutions focused on industrial efficiency and sustainability. Held annually in Sertãozinho, São Paulo, the fair has established itself as one of the main meeting points for the bioenergy, biofuels, and renewable energy markets, promoting strategic networking, business generation, and high-level technical debates.
fenasucro.texto2: Mamuth has participated in Fenasucro for over five consecutive years, reinforcing its commitment to innovation, quality, and an active presence in the sector's development. Throughout these editions, the company has presented its solutions and technologies focused on high operational performance, strengthening partnerships, expanding its market visibility, and closely following the trends that drive the industry. This constant presence demonstrates Mamuth’s solid positioning as a technical reference and strategic partner for the sugar-energy sector.

navalshore.title: Navalshore Fair
navalshore.subtitle: R$ 12 Billion in Business. And You, Where Will You Be?
navalshore.texto1: Navalshore is the leading event for the naval and offshore industry in Latin America, bringing together shipyards, shipowners, technology providers, energy companies, and maritime sector specialists. Recognized as one of the most important showcases for innovation and business in the field, the fair presents solutions for shipbuilding, maintenance, port operations, and offshore exploration, while promoting strategic debates on the future of the maritime industry in Brazil and worldwide.
navalshore.texto2: Held in the state of Rio de Janeiro, Navalshore connects key market players, creating an environment conducive to qualified networking, the generation of commercial opportunities, and the strengthening of strategic partnerships. The event also highlights advances in technology, operational safety, and production efficiency—fundamental pillars for the sustainable growth of the naval and offshore sector.
navalshore.texto3: In 2026, Mamuth makes its debut at Navalshore, marking a new milestone in its trajectory of expansion and strategic positioning. Our presence at the event reinforces the company’s commitment to expanding its operations in the maritime sector, presenting high-performance solutions for demanding industrial operations. This debut represents a significant step in consolidating Mamuth as a reliable and innovative partner across different heavy industry segments.

mangueiras.subtitle: Robust solutions and cutting-edge technology for your industrial operation.
mangueiras.subtitlePoliamida2800: APPLICATION: Used in systems for cleaning, unclogging, waste removal, and surface preparation using high-pressure water jetting. They are also popularly known as pigtails or flexible lances.
mangueiras.subtitlePoliamida1500: APPLICATION: Used in systems for cleaning, unclogging, debris removal, and surface preparation through High-Pressure Water Jetting. They are also popularly known as pigtails or flexible lances.
mangueiras.subtitleWaterblast: Recommended for cleaning systems, unclogging, debris removal, and surface preparation using Water Jetting. Inner tube manufactured in water-resistant synthetic rubber, reinforced with braided steel wire spirals, and protected by a synthetic rubber cover resistant to ozone, weather conditions, and heat.
mangueiras.subtitleMangueira10k: Recommended for cleaning systems, unclogging, debris removal, and surface preparation using Water Jetting. Inner tube manufactured in water-resistant synthetic rubber, reinforced by braided steel wire spirals, and covered with a layer of synthetic rubber resistant to ozone, weather, and heat.
mangueiras.subtitleNiples: Fittings, Unions, Adapters, and Couplings are essential items for joining, coupling, and adapting hoses and accessories. MAMUTH offers a complete line of these items to meet every need. We also handle custom requests and manufacture tailor-made items upon order. Our portfolio is divided into two lines: one limited up to 1,500 bar and another for pressures up to 2,800 bar. All these items are manufactured in high-performance stainless steel.
mangueiras.subtitleNiplesAdap: Fittings, Unions, Adapters, and Couplings are essential items for joining, coupling, and adapting hoses and accessories. MAMUTH offers a complete line of these items to meet every need. We also handle custom requests and manufacture tailor-made items upon order. Our portfolio is divided into two lines: one limited up to 1,500 bar and another for pressures up to 2,800 bar. All these items are manufactured in high-performance stainless steel.
mangueiras.subtitleLuvasUniao: Fittings indicated for pumps, hoses, and water jetting accessories with pressures up to 1,500 bar (22,000 psi).
mangueiras.titleLuvasEmenda: UAP Splice Sleeves up to 3,200 bar
mangueiras.subtitleLuvasEmenda: Fittings indicated for pumps, hoses, lances, and water jetting accessories with pressures up to 3,200 bar (46,400 psi).
mangueiras.subtitleEngates: The ER12 and ER20 quick coupling models are ideal for joining hoses in a practical and secure manner. These couplings feature a threaded nut that connects the male and female ends, eliminating the need for a wrench for torqueing, as only manual tightening is required.
mangueiras.titleLuvasDistribuidorUAP: UAP Y, T, and 90° Elbow Manifolds
mangueiras.subtitleLuvasDistribuidorUAP: Manifolds are used to split the water flow and increase the number of hoses to be used in Ultra-High Pressure operations.
mangueiras.subtitleDistribuidorSAP: Manifolds are used to split the water flow and increase the number of hoses in use, allowing multiple operations to occur simultaneously. With these devices, it is possible to optimize the use of water resources by directing water to different application points in an efficient and controlled manner. Furthermore, the manifolds ensure uniform flow distribution, which is essential for maintaining proper pressure across all outlets, resulting in higher productivity and precision in operations.

lavadoras.subtitle: Robust solutions and cutting-edge technology for your industrial operation.
lavadoras.subtitle50cv: Typhoon-Jet water jetting machines are ideal for exclusive and fast-paced tasks. Equipped with a three-phase electric motor, they provide power and efficiency for cleaning tough surfaces. Their robust construction and high-quality components ensure durability and consistent performance, even under the most demanding conditions, while the design allows for easy mobility and positioning in various environments.
lavadoras.subtitle500: The Typhoon-Jet 500 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in extremely heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 500 bar, a flow rate of 20 L/min, and 25 HP of power, this equipment ensures superior results for any cleaning challenge.
lavadoras.subtitle350: The Typhoon-Jet 350 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 350 bar, a flow rate of 17 L/min, and 15 HP of power, this equipment ensures superior results for any cleaning challenge.
lavadoras.subtitle200: The Typhoon-Jet 200 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 200 bar, a flow rate of 45 L/min, and 20 HP of power, this equipment ensures superior results for any cleaning challenge.
lavadoras.subtitle170: The Typhoon-Jet 170 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in moderate cleaning tasks across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 170 bar (2,465 PSI), a flow rate of 12 L/min (720 L/h), and 5 HP of power, this equipment ensures effective results for moderate-intensity cleaning challenges.
lavadoras.subtitleHot: The Typhoon-Hot is a high-pressure hot water washer (up to 100°C), ideal for heavy-duty industrial use. It combines high pressure, temperature, and flow rate to efficiently remove grease and tough residues. Featuring a triplex pump, gasoline or electric options, and a reinforced frame, it ensures performance, versatility, and reliability across various sectors.

vestimentas.subtitleMacacao: Protective coveralls indicated for workers in the sugar and ethanol industry and/or operations with SAP model water jetting pumps. Made of a double layer of high-tenacity synthetic woven fabric, externally waterproofed with PVC, it features waterproofed seams.
vestimentas.subtitleVestimenta: Protective garment indicated for workers in the Marine, Oil & Gas, and Petrochemical sectors, and/or operations with UAP model water jetting pumps. Made of a triple layer of high-tenacity synthetic woven fabric, externally waterproofed with PVC, it features waterproofed seams.
vestimentas.subtitleMangueira: Protective cover indicated for hoses operating at pressures up to 2,800 bar. It provides protection in the event of an accidental rupture by forming a shield, preventing high-pressure water from hitting the operator.
vestimentas.subtitleAir: The Air System 200 Mamuth is a cooling system that provides purified air for up to three water jetting operators simultaneously. With adjustable temperatures ranging from -5°C to +20°C, it reduces thermal fatigue and increases productivity in harsh environments, ensuring comfort and operational safety through a mobile and efficient chassis.

Robo.subtitleWorker: The Falch Robo Line Worker 250 is an ultra-high pressure water jetting robot designed for heavy-duty industrial cleaning. It operates at up to 3,000 bar, removing severe scaling with high precision. Robust, safe, and efficient, it features IP65/IP55 protection, electric operation, and a compact design, ensuring high productivity, mobility, and reliability for demanding applications.
Robo.subtitleMagnetico: The Climb Rob is a versatile magnetic robot designed for high-pressure and ultra-high-pressure water jetting on vertical and inclined metallic surfaces. Equipped with a powerful magnetic system, it ensures safe and stable adhesion, allowing for automated cleaning and surface preparation in the marine, oil & gas, and industrial sectors with maximum efficiency and operator safety.
Robo.subtitleLift250: El Lift Worker 250 Beam es un equipo de hidrojet profesional para alta presión. Con cubierta de protección y extracción de residuos, garantiza productividad y seguridad en la remoción de revestimientos. Su diseño optimiza la distancia del chorro y reduce la oxidación, proporcionando superficies limpias, secas y con bajo nivel de ruido.

bombas.subtitlePump125: 125 kW pump for high performance and pressure up to 3,000 bar. German technology focused on durability and stability, ensuring maximum efficiency and low operational cost in extreme conditions.
bombas.subtitlePump250: 250 kW pump for high volumes and pressure up to 3,000 bar. German technology featuring Quick Check for maintenance in minutes, ensuring maximum availability and efficiency in critical operations.
bombas.subtitlePump500: 500 kW pump for ultra capacity and pressure up to 3,000 bar. German technology featuring Quick Check for agile maintenance, ensuring maximum productivity and high performance in large-scale operations.
bombas.subtitle600: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 600 bar and a flow rate of up to 35 L/min.
bombas.subtitle500: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 500 bar and a flow rate of 20 L/min.
bombas.subtitle350: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 350 bar and a flow rate of 19 L/min.
bombas.subtitle250: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 250 bar and a flow rate of 17 L/min.
bombas.subtitle200: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 200 bar and a flow rate of 45 L/min.
bombas.subtitle50ff: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 160 bar and a flow rate of 150 L/min.

bicos.subtitleRotativo: Nozzles indicated for water jetting machines up to 500 bar. They can be used for surface cleaning, pipe jetting, or abrasive blasting.
bicos.subtitleSafira: Nozzles or inserts are used in accessories applied in the water jetting process, such as high-pressure guns, rotary tools, spray bars, and rotary nozzles, among others.
bicos.subtitlePortaSafira: The 3/8” Sapphire Nozzle mounting holder is an essential component in cleaning, blasting, or cutting operations using Ultra-High Pressure (UHP) guns. This holder is designed to ensure secure and stable nozzle fixation, providing precision and efficiency during use.
bicos.subtitleRetoLeque: The holder for Form 4 Straight Nozzles and Form 19 Fan Nozzles is primarily used in cleaning, blasting, or cutting operations with high-pressure guns. They are recommended for applications up to 1,500 bar / 21,750 psi.
bicos.subtitleRotativo600: Nozzles indicated for water jetting machines up to 500 bar. They can be used for surface cleaning, pipe jetting, or abrasive blasting.
bicos.subtitleTorpedo12: Specific protective and cleaning nozzle for pipes.
bicos.subtitleSharkJet: The Shark-Jet 22K and 40K is a self-propelled rotary tool indicated for jetting, cleaning, and surface preparation of flat or irregular surfaces.
bicos.subtitleRotativoTitan: The Titan Nozzle is a self-propelled rotary nozzle developed for general pipe cleaning and unclogging with pressures between 1,000 bar and 2,800 bar. The rotary nozzle heads are manufactured in different orifice configurations.
bicos.subtitleBicoReto: Nozzles or inserts are used in accessories applied in the water jetting process, such as high-pressure guns, rotary tools, spray bars, and rotary nozzles, among others.
bicos.subtitleFoguetinho: The 'Foguetinho' type fixed nozzle is indicated for cleaning and unclogging the internal walls of heat exchanger tubes, evaporators, and general pipe lines.
bicos.subtitleFerret: The Ferret 22K Self-Propelled Nozzle is indicated for operations with pressures up to 1,600 bar and a flow rate of 80 L/min. With this tool, it is possible to perform unclogging and cleaning of pipes between 2' and 6', especially in pipes with 90° bends.
bicos.subtitleAttack: State-of-the-art equipment for demanding industrial applications.

hidroacesso.subtitleViper40k: The system is designed to isolate the pneumatic circuit, ensuring that water pressure and lance rotation are activated only when both triggers are pressed simultaneously, providing precise and secure control.
hidroacesso.subtitlePneumatica: They provide greater robustness and durability, ensuring the equipment withstands demanding working conditions without compromising structural integrity.
hidroacesso.subtitlePFechado: Developed to withstand extreme conditions, providing durability and a long service life for the equipment.
hidroacesso.subtitlePAberto: State-of-the-art equipment for demanding industrial applications.
hidroacesso.subtitleTubeclean: A tool designed to assist the operator in the efficient cleaning of evaporators and various pipelines, especially in vertical positions. Ideal for removing residues and obstructions, ensuring proper maintenance and continuous system operation.
hidroacesso.subtitlePowerBox: The Power Box MAMUTH 2,800 Bar is an accessory that must be used in conjunction with the MTP 2,800 Bar Double Trigger Gun or the Viper 40K Rotary Gun.
hidroacesso.titlePedal: MTPA Open Flow Foot Pedal 1,400 Bar
hidroacesso.subtitlePedal: The MTPA Open Flow Foot Pedal 1,400 Bar is indicated for work where the water jetting operator needs to use both hands, ideal for cleaning heat exchangers or general piping. This accessory provides greater safety and comfort as the operator has full control over the water flow release with their feet.
hidroacesso.subtitleMalha: A safety device used in hose and pipe joints to prevent sudden movement or whipping in the event of a connection failure.
hidroacesso.subtitleLanca: Known as Rods or Lances, these are used as flow conductors or as extensions for nozzles and hoses. They can be manufactured in any length.
hidroacesso.subtitleLaco: A safety device used in hose and pipe joints to prevent sudden movement or whipping in the event of a connection failure.
hidroacesso.subtitleDistorcedor: The Swivel is a safety item that, when used with the hose, eliminates torsional stress on the terminal, thus avoiding premature breakage and subsequent accidents.
hidroacesso.subtitleCabecote: The NLB 3D Torrent Head is an advanced tool specifically designed for efficient tank cleaning. This device not only drastically reduces cleaning time but also provides total operational safety by eliminating the need for an operator in confined spaces, which is essential for minimizing risks.

hidrolavadoras.subtitlePistolas: Spray guns and lances designed for high-pressure washers.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula550: Pressure regulating valve (By-Pass) with safety function.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula350: Pressure regulating valve (By-Pass) with safety function.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula200: Pressure regulating valve (By-Pass) with safety function. Suitable for high-flow pumps.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula660: Safety valve that limits the maximum pressure of the high-pressure system. When the pressure limit is exceeded, the valve opens to release the excess pressure.

pecasBombas.subtitlePecas: MAMUTH offers a complete line of parts for High and Ultra-High Pressure Pumps, covering a wide range of brands and models available on the market. Our parts are of our own manufacture, which allows us to guarantee high standards of quality and durability.
